new_terms.context: Charges for the electrical distribution network and the providers' regulated income.
A pre-determined, regulated financial return for T&D providers.
Additional services required to support the transmission of electric power from seller to purchaser.
The specific timeframe (e.g., 2025/26) for which capacity is auctioned and must be available.
Regions where electricity markets are open to competition rather than being vertically integrated monopolies.
Additional costs added to the wholesale price of electricity by retail providers.
